# Accio Commerce Copilot Application Packet

Version: `0.2.0`
Category: AI startup pitch
Deadline: 2026 CoCreate Pitch cycle; exact form deadline requires live Accio Work validation
Production readiness: 58%

## Application Thesis

Accio Commerce Copilot turns opportunity discovery, rule reading, evidence collection, demo packaging, and external submissions into AI-native startup operations.

## Eligibility Gates

- active: AI commerce product thesis is core to the pitch and demo. Evidence: `docs/pitch/product_pitch.md`.
- mapped: Accio Work / Alibaba CoCreate flow is mapped for application drafting. Evidence: `automation/form_payloads/accio_cocreate_submission.json`.
- active: Interactive demo MVP shows sourcing, risk, and ROI workflows. Evidence: `C:\git\websites\alibaba_cocreate_pitch_2026`.
- active: Landed-cost, margin, CAC, payback, and supplier-risk economics are ready. Evidence: `docs/pitch/unit_economics.md`.
- planned: Short demo-video outline and production shot list are ready. Evidence: `docs/media/video_outline.md`.
- active: Submission packet includes copy blocks, checklist, evidence, and automation receipts. Evidence: `submission/SUBMISSION_PACKET.md`.
- operator_session_required: External form can be filled only in an authorized operator session. Evidence: `runbooks/automation.md`.
